title: Hoisin Meatloaf
ingredients: 2 large scallions, thinly sliced and divided
instructions:
Preheat the oven to 350°.
Spray a foil baking sheet with cooking spray.
In a large bowl combine the beef, panko, soy sauce, 2tbsp Hoisin, scallion, egg and garlic. Mix well.
Place the meat mixture on the foil baking sheet and form into a loaf. Spread the remaining Hoisin sauce over the top of the loaf, adding more if needed.
Place in the oven and bake for 50-60 minutes. Garnish with additional scallions and serve.
